productDisplayName: Nike Men's New Ap Swsh C Black Socks
description: CompositionBlack Sports socks made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandex, with arch support and half-cushion terry footFittingSnugWash care Machine wash cold in not more than 30 degrees Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Do not iron Gear up and enhance your performance in these nike socks. Offering a dry, fresh Fit and anple padding under the midfoot arch for a secure and stable support, besides a comfortable shock-absorbing padding in the toe region, this pair is all that you need to make that difference in your game. Team this with sports shoes when on the field or gym, or with lifestyle shoes and denims or skirts for that uber cool look.
